name: Compliance change
about: Control, policy, or reporting change required for regulatory compliance

## Requirement Source
_Which regulation or FCA/PRA rule drives this change? Exact reference (e.g., CASS 15.2.2R)._

## Control Impacted
_Which internal control is affected? Reference `.claude/rules/compliance-boundaries.md`._

## Current Behaviour
_How does the system behave today?_

## Desired Behaviour
_How must the system behave after this change?_

## Systems Affected
_List all services, databases, reports, and agents that must change._

| System | Change required |
|--------|----------------|
| | |

_What documentation, correspondence, or regulatory guidance supports this change?_
